title: Section — Summary Quantity Takeoff (QTO)
description: The single source of truth for quantities. Every other section (budget, trade pages, submittal register, bid log) pulls its quantities from here — they never restate a quantity, they reference a takeoff_id. Each line is tied to a MasterFormat division (the universal sort key), a unit of measure, and (where known) a scope item and location. Listed in CSI MasterFormat division order. The initial QTO is built from the OCR4 extraction; conflicts are verified against the real drawings and sanity-checked. The model carries only quantities supported by the documents/drawings — it never invents measurement or pricing.

location.description: Area / room / level / zone / grid the quantity belongs to, when stated — supports area- and phase-based estimating.

cost_code.description: Sub-division cost code within the trade (e.g. 'demo', 'new_work', 'schedule') so budgets can split a division.

sheet.description: Drawing sheet / schedule id the quantity was read from.

verified_against_drawings.description: True once a conflict/sanity-check was reconciled against the real drawings.

by_division_summary.description: Optional roll-up of total quantity by CSI division and UOM, for quick conceptual checks.
